Title: Core switch unresponsive — total LAN outage
Root Cause: Power supply unit failed due to voltage surge
Resolution Notes: Replaced PSU with spare unit. Added UPS monitoring to prevent recurrence.

Title: Intermittent packet loss on VLAN 20
Root Cause: Duplex mismatch between SW-ACCESS-02 and upstream port
Resolution Notes: Set explicit full-duplex on both interfaces. Spanning tree re-converged.

Title: VoIP calls dropping every 30 minutes
Resolution Notes: QoS markings being reviewed on RTR-CORE-01. Wireshark capture in progress.

Title: Printer SRV-PRINT-01 unreachable from VLAN 10
Root Cause: IP conflict — duplicate assignment from DHCP misconfiguration
Resolution Notes: Reserved static IP in DHCP scope. Updated IP Assignments tracker.

Title: Slow internet speeds reported company-wide
Resolution Notes: Confirmed ISP issue via NOC ticket. No internal action required. ISP resolved within 2 hours.

Title: Access point AP-FLOOR1-01 offline
Resolution Notes: Power cycling scheduled for maintenance window.
